headline: 3 Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Electronics Components Industry
summary: The Zacks Electronics - Miscellaneous Components industry players like TEL, FN and TTMI are benefiting from the solid adoption of AI and the democratization of IoT.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader technology sectors are trading lower following reports that OpenAI has missed some internal targets for sales and usership. Also, ongoing Middle East tensions are weighing on broader sentiment.

headline: Does TE Connectivity (TEL) Have the Potential to Rally 25.15% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for TE Connectivity (TEL) points to a 25.2% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
